name: manage_sync_products
description: List and manage synchronized products in your Printful store, including creating, updating, and deleting product listings. Sync products link your e-commerce store items to Printful catalog products.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip in the result list for pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items per page (1-100).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by sync status: all, synced, unsynced, or ignored.
